items.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
items.raw_content: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. Ahead of OpenAI’s highly anticipated IPO, the court could rule on whether the company is allowed to exist as a for-profit enterprise and might even oust…
items.ai_summary: 马斯克与奥特曼本周将在加州法院就OpenAI转型营利和未来IPO展开法律战，案件可能产生深远影响。

items.title: The missing step between hype and profit
items.raw_content: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. In February, I picked up a flyer at an anti-AI march in London. I can’t say for sure whether or not its writers meant to riff on South Park’s underpants gnomes. But…
items.ai_summary: 文章探讨AI从炒作到盈利的缺失环节，指出企业部署AI面临数据基础薄弱等实质性障碍。

items.title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
items.raw_content: Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data. While consumer-facing AI tools have dazzled users with speed and ease, enterprise leaders are discovering that deploying AI at scale requires something far less glamorous but far more consequential: data…
items.ai_summary: 企业发现大规模部署AI的最大障碍是数据基础薄弱，需要重建数据堆栈以支持AI应用。

items.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
items.raw_content: On April 24, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. The model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 is open source, meaning it is available…
items.ai_summary: 中国AI公司DeepSeek发布了其新旗舰模型V4预览版，该模型采用新设计以更高效处理长文本，并延续开源传统。

items.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
items.raw_content: Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and predictive systems across finance, supply chains, human resources, and customer operations. By the end of 2025, half of companies used AI in at least three business functions, according to a recent survey. But as AI becomes…
items.ai_summary: 企业AI应用正从实验走向日常，但需要强大的数据织物来支撑其业务价值。

items.title: Weaponized deepfakes
items.raw_content: For years, experts have warned that deepfakes—AI-generated videos, images, or audio recordings of people doing or saying things they haven’t actually done in real life—could be deployed in malicious ways.  These dangers are now here. Improvements in deepfake technology, and the widespread availability of easy-to-use and cheap (or free) generative models, have made it easier…
items.ai_summary: 深度伪造技术日益成熟且易于获取，已被用于恶意目的，安全威胁加剧。

items.title: Supercharged scams
items.raw_content: When ChatGPT was released to the public in late 2022, it opened people’s eyes to how easily generative AI could churn out vast amounts of human-seeming text from simple prompts. This quickly caught the attention of criminals, who soon began using large language models to produce malicious emails—both the untargeted spam kind and more sophisticated,…
items.ai_summary: 生成式AI被犯罪分子用于制作恶意邮件和诈骗内容，超级诈骗时代来临。

items.title: LLMs+
items.raw_content: When ChatGPT launched as an experimental prototype in late 2022, OpenAI’s chatbot became an everyday everything app for hundreds of millions of people. LLMs like ChatGPT were the new future: The entire tech industry was consumed by the inferno, with companies racing to spin up rival products. The ashes of the old tech world still…
items.ai_summary: ChatGPT引爆了LLM热潮，但如今整个技术行业正在经历从狂热到理性的转变。

items.title: World models
items.raw_content: AI systems have already gained impressive mastery over the digital world, but the physical world is still humanity’s domain. As it turns out, building an AI system that can compose a novel or code an app is far easier than developing one that can fold laundry or navigate a city street. To get there, many…
items.ai_summary: AI在数字世界表现出色，但在物理世界（如折叠衣物、导航）仍面临挑战，世界模型或成突破口。

items.title: 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
items.ai_summary: 文章列出了当前AI领域最重要的10个趋势和技术，涵盖研究与应用前沿。
